sell.saleConfirmed: Sale confirmed — scan the next product.
sell.cartEmptyHint: Scan a product barcode to add it to the cart.

addProduct.title: Add Product
addProduct.scanHint: Point your camera at the product barcode to fill the field automatically.
addProduct.priceInvalid: Must be a valid non-negative number
addProduct.stockInvalid: Must be a non-negative whole number

adjust.title: Stock Adjustment
adjust.belowZero: Cannot adjust: new stock would be {stock} (below 0)
adjust.enterAmount: Enter a positive or negative amount
adjust.emptyHint: Scan a barcode or search by name to select a product

barcode.scannerReady: Ready to scan — point your barcode scanner at a product
barcode.cameraDeniedHint: Allow camera access in your browser settings, then try again.

guide.title: App Guide
guide.subtitle: How to use the Store Inventory app
guide.s1s2d: Camera — tap the camera button and point at the barcode. Physical scanner — switch to Scanner mode and scan with your USB/Bluetooth device.
guide.s1s3d: Each scan adds 1 unit. Tap + / − to adjust quantity. Tap the trash icon to remove an item.
guide.s1s4d: Stock is deducted automatically. A success message appears.
guide.s1s5d: Tap View Invoice to download the PDF receipt.
guide.s1tip: If a product shows "Out of stock" it won't be added. Adjust stock first (step 4).
guide.s2s2d: Type in the search box to filter the list instantly.
guide.s2s3d: Green = more than 10 units · Amber = 1–10 units · Red = out of stock.
guide.s2s4d: Each product card has a quick link to the adjustment screen.
guide.s2tip: Tap the refresh button to sync the latest stock from the server.
guide.s3Subtitle: Register a new product — admin only
guide.s3s2d: Name, Barcode (or tap the scan icon), Price, and Initial Stock are required.
guide.s3tip: The barcode field doubles as the SKU identifier shown in the product list.
guide.s4Subtitle: Correct stock after counts or deliveries
guide.s4s2d: Scan its barcode or search by name.
guide.s4s3d: Positive number (+10) to add stock. Negative (−3) to reduce it. Use the +/− stepper or type directly.
guide.s4tip: Stock can't go below 0. The app will block the adjustment if the result would be negative.
guide.s5s2d: Set a start and end date to narrow the list.
guide.s5s3d: Select a name from the dropdown to see their sales only.
guide.s5s4: Tap a sale to expand it
guide.s5s4d: Shows each item, quantities, and line totals.
guide.s5s5d: Each sale has a button to download its PDF receipt.
